title: Inside the Met Gala: A-Listers Gossip and Dance While Sabrina Carpenter and Stevie Nicks Perform
summary: Following a lively celeb-filled carpet at The Metropolitan Museum of Art in New York City on Monday, the vibes for fashion's biggest night appeared to elevate once inside.

title: Aespa’s Karina and Ningning Make Dazzling Met Gala Debut
summary: The K-pop stars are set to release their second full-length album, ‘Lemonade,’ later this month, before embarking on a world tour this summer.

title: ‘The Devil Wears Prada’ Cast Stuns at 2026 Met Gala, But Miranda Priestly Fashionably Skips
summary: Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt and Stanley Tucci, as well as Simone Ashley, attended the event at The Metropolitan Museum of Art in New York City on Monday.

title: The Blackpink Gals Reunite as Lisa, Rosé, Jennie and Jisoo All Attend Met Gala For the First Time
summary: Jennie, Jisoo, Lisa and Rosé each attended fashion’s biggest night, with Lisa serving as a member of the hosting committee. It marks the first time all four women attended the same year.
